overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a female character walking through a stylized urban park with large graffiti-covered rock formations. The character navigates from a narrow dirt corridor between rock walls into an open paved plaza with palm trees, circling around a white van while tall city buildings rise in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between graffiti-covered rock walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow rock corridor toward the city buildings in the distance

entered.detail: tall vertical rock wall with colorful graffiti and green moss patches
tall vertical rock wall with abstract paint patterns and weathered texture
large white multi-story hotel building with grid windows and curved facade
tall palm trees visible in the distance between the rock formations

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow dirt corridor flanked by tall rock walls covered in graffiti and street art. The path leads toward a large white hotel building visible in the distance, with palm trees framing the exit of the passage. The environment is enclosed and intimate, with the rock walls creating a canyon-like atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: open paved plaza with parked vehicle and tropical landscaping

events.description: exits narrow rock corridor into open paved plaza with palm trees
character turns left and begins navigating around the parked white van

agents.ego_description: turning left and walking around the white van, exploring the open plaza area

notable_agents.action: white SUV van parked on the plaza, character walks around the front of the vehicle

entered.detail: white sport utility vehicle with black trim parked on the paved surface
tall modern skyscraper with reflective glass windows
large sculptural rock formation with distinctive pink and red painted sections

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up into a sunlit paved plaza with tropical palm trees. The character turns left to navigate around a parked white van, revealing more of the urban environment including a modern glass skyscraper and colorful rock art installations. The transition from enclosed corridor to open space is marked by the change from dirt to paved ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with rock art installations

events.description: character stops walking and looks around the environment

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the plaza and pausing to look at the surrounding rock formations and buildings

entered.detail: additional rock formations visible in the background beyond the plaza

segments.scene_description: Having passed the van, the character continues exploring the open plaza, walking past the pink-painted rock formation. The camera reveals more of the urban landscape with tall buildings surrounding the art installation area. The character eventually stops to look around, taking in the view of the rock structures and city architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined, graffiti-lined canyon into a wide, sunlit urban plaza. It begins with the character navigating a narrow dirt corridor flanked by tall rock walls covered in street art, moving toward a distant white hotel framed by palm trees. As the path transitions from dirt to pavement, the scene opens into a bright plaza where the camera turns left to circle around a parked white van, revealing a modern glass skyscraper. The view then expands further as the character walks past a pink-painted rock formation, shifting the focus from the intimate corridor to the surrounding city architecture. Finally, the movement slows as the character stops to take in the contrast between the colorful art installations and the towering buildings of the urban landscape.
